author: Andrey Yunoshev
name: 13L int4 MLP + qTTT + QAT Precompile + ANS Hybrid Compression
blurb: 13-layer int4 MLP + int5 attn with adaptive Hessian GPTQ clip, qTTT (Q-only test-time AdamW), QAT-precompile warmup (eliminates ~120s mid-training torch.compile stall), per-tensor hybrid ANS+brotli compression, document-boundary VARLEN training attention. Funded by RunPod credits grant. val_bpb 1.1280 at 600s eval, 5076 train steps in 600s.
